description: You are a transportation planner who needs to create a traffic simulation model for a proposed suburban residential development with a grid street layout. Using SUMO command-line tools, build a complete simulation in /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/grid_development/. Generate a grid network (4 junctions in x-direction, 3 junctions in y-direction, 200m edge length, 2 lanes per edge, and a speed limit of 13.89 m/s) saved as grid.net.xml. Generate random traffic demand for a 3600-second duration with an 18-second trip period, saved to routes.rou.xml. Create a SUMO configuration file named grid.sumocfg that references the network and route files, sets the simulation end time to 3600, and configures tripinfo output. Run the simulation to produce the final output at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/grid_development/tripinfo.xml.
